image:image.image:title: Lyudmil Dachev – Brand Identity & Digital Product Designer
image:image.image:caption: Lyudmil Dachev is a brand identity and digital product designer crafting clean, functional visuals and usable interfaces for startups and established brands.

image:image.image:title: Contact – Lyudmil Dachev
image:image.image:caption: Project inquiries and direct contact. Start a project or license a system with Lyudmil Dachev.

image:image.image:title: Newsletter — New Work & Limited Releases by Lyudmil Dachev
image:image.image:caption: Subscribe for infrequent updates on new art prints, type releases, and selected work by Lyudmil Dachev — plus occasional notes on process. No spam, no schedule.

image:image.image:title: Store – Prints & Digital Products by Lyudmil Dachev
image:image.image:caption: Browse limited edition screen prints, prints, typefaces, and other digital products by Lyudmil Dachev.

image:image.image:title: 314 bits — Geometric Display Typeface (575 Glyphs) by Lyudmil Dachev
image:image.image:caption: 314 Bits is a geometric display typeface developed from 2009–2024. Includes 575 glyphs and OpenType features (aalt, salt, ss01, subs, sups). Instant download.

image:image.image:title: Flag Icons – 112 Minimal Flag Icons & Lottie Animations by Lyudmil Dachev
image:image.image:caption: Flag Icons is a collection of 112 minimal flag icons by Lyudmil Dachev, plus 15 animated flags in Lottie, JSON, GIF and EPS formats. Personal & commercial use allowed.

image:image.image:title: The horizon – Limited Edition Screen Print by Lyudmil Dachev
image:image.image:caption: The horizon is a limited edition hand-pulled screen print by Lyudmil Dachev. Edition of 5, signed and numbered, 25×17.5 cm. Ships worldwide.

image:image.image:title: The kiss – Limited Edition Screen Print by Lyudmil Dachev
image:image.image:caption: The kiss is a limited edition hand-pulled screen print by Lyudmil Dachev. Edition of 9, signed and numbered, 40×50 cm. Ships worldwide.

image:image.image:title: Stray – Limited Edition Giclée Print by Lyudmil Dachev
image:image.image:caption: Stray is an original fine art giclée print by Lyudmil Dachev, printed on museum-quality Hahnemühle Photo Rag® paper and hand-signed by the artist. Available in 30 × 40 cm. Ships worldwide.
